Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_START
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5008 0 0}I'm detecting a major presence upstairs! It has to be our target![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}It's hiding in {f 0 1 2}a larger room on the third floor{f 0 1 27}. Head that way and track it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SHOWER_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5056 0 0}I'm sorry... I only sensed the one Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}And I hate to bear more bad news on top of this, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}A barrier has gone up within the building... You won't be able to reach it this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SHOWER_FUKA2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1089 0 0}So we can blame that Shadow for getting us trapped down here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SHOWER_FUKA3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm going to try and find a way to break this barrier. In the meantime, please reconvene on the second floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_204BREAK_HANSE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It seems that breaking the wrong mirror will cause the Shadow to target you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Try breaking the {f 0 1 2}mirror in Room 205{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm certain that will trigger something. Please head there right away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HANSEI1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It seems that breaking the wrong mirror will cause the Shadow to target you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Try breaking a mirror that {f 0 1 2}doesn't show your reflection{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HANSEI2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It looks like that wasn't the right mirror. This Shadow is determined...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It may be hard to tell in the darkness, but remember: you're looking for a {f 0 1 2}mirror that doesn't show your reflection{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Keep searching. I'll do what I can to hone in on its location![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_HANSEI3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Is everyone okay? I hope you can forgive me for not being of much help...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But I've finally got a lock on the reading! You have to break {f 0 1 2}the mirror in Room 304{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 0 1 2}Room 304{f 0 1 27} isn't far. Please hurry and find it![n]{f 1 1}
